title: 3M Bair Hugger 775 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the 3M Bair Hugger 775 Series patient warming system, including filter inspection, temperature calibration, over-temperature testing, electrical safety documentation, and CMMS copy text.
interval: Operating temperature calibration and over-temperature detection system test every 6 months or 500 hours of use; air filter replacement every 12 months or 500 hours of use.

title: Cardinal Health Kendall SCD 700 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Cardinal Health Kendall SCD 700 Series sequential compression device controller, including filter inspection, Basic Functional Test, battery check, and electrical safety documentation.
interval: As needed

title: Welch Allyn Connex 6000 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Welch Allyn Connex 6000 Series vital signs monitor, including manufacturer-listed intervals, functional verification, electrical safety testing, pass/fail criteria, and CMMS copy text.
interval: NIBP annually; SpO2 annually; SpHb annually; SureTemp Plus annually; Braun ThermoScan PRO 6000 annually; CO2 annually or by hour interval if equipped; battery replacement at 300 charge cycles; housing air vents cleaned annually.

title: Cardinal Health Kangaroo ePump - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Cardinal Health Kangaroo ePump enteral feeding pump, including annual re-certification, flow accuracy check, battery condition check, cleaning review, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Performance re-certification at least once per year, or any time improper performance is suspected. Cleaning as needed / facility-defined. Battery replacement has no fixed interval listed; replace if battery life degrades.

title: Hillrom VersaCare - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Hillrom VersaCare hospital bed, including annual PM inspection, leakage current testing, battery interval check, bed function testing, siderail checks, caster and brake inspection, and optional scale or IntelliDrive checks.
interval: Annual PM and testing recommended. Batteries should be replaced every 3 years.

title: Medtronic Valleylab FT10 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Medtronic Valleylab FT10 electrosurgical unit, including visual inspection, self-test, audio verification, RF output checks, REM testing, cross-coupling verification, leakage testing, and ground continuity documentation.
interval: Annual periodic safety check, or as directed by troubleshooting/service requirements.

title: ZOLL R Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the ZOLL R Series defibrillator, including annual maintenance checkout, leakage current testing, defibrillator output testing, sync testing, and option-specific checks.
interval: Every 12 months. NIBP volume leak test and NIBP transducer calibration test, if installed, annually or every 10,000 readings, whichever comes first.

title: Medtronic Valleylab Force FX - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Medtronic Valleylab Force FX electrosurgical generator, including inspection, self-test, REM verification, output confirmation, leakage testing, RF leakage checks, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Every six months

title: GE Healthcare LOGIQ E Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the GE Healthcare LOGIQ E Series ultrasound system, including visual inspection, functional checks, measurement accuracy, electrical safety testing, probe leakage documentation, and CMMS copy/paste PM text.
interval: Periodic Maintenance Inspections are not mandatory per the provided manual. Manufacturer care schedule is reference/facility QA dependent; safety inspections are stated as at least every 12 months according to IEC-EN 60601-1.

title: CONMED System 2450 / 5000 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for CONMED System 2450 and System 5000 electrosurgical generators, including inspection, electrical safety, output verification, leakage testing, A.R.M. testing, capacitance checks, calibration guidance, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Visual inspection at least every 6 months; performance testing at least once every year.

title: ZOLL X Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the ZOLL X Series defibrillator/monitor, including manufacturer-listed PM items, electrical safety testing, defibrillator output testing, pacer testing, parameter checks, and CMMS copy/paste documentation.
interval: At minimum, CO2 calibration and NIBP calibration check are listed annually when equipped. Operator shift checklist is listed for beginning of every shift. Full maintenance test interval beyond those minimum annual items is not specified in the provided service manual.

title: Drager Evita V500 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Drager Evita V500 ventilator, including manufacturer-listed maintenance intervals, safety checks, electrical safety testing, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Inspection and safety checks every 12 months; additional manufacturer-listed component intervals vary from 4 weeks to 6 years.

title: GE Healthcare CARESCAPE B850 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the GE Healthcare CARESCAPE Monitor B850, including visual inspection, electrical safety testing, functional checkout, CPU timekeeper battery interval review, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Every 2 years after installation. CPU timekeeper battery replacement every 5 years or when Service Monitor Error Code 0xHOST1100 is shown.

title: GE Healthcare CARESCAPE B650 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the GE Healthcare CARESCAPE Monitor B650 patient monitor, including manufacturer recommendation, visual inspection, electrical safety testing, functional checks, battery maintenance, and CMMS copy text.
interval: Every 12 months after installation. CPU battery replacement every 5 years or when the Service Monitor - Replace System Battery message is shown.

title: GE Healthcare CARESCAPE B450 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the GE Healthcare CARESCAPE B450 patient monitor, including annual manufacturer-listed PM items, electrical safety testing, functional checkout, battery maintenance, CPU timekeeper battery review, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Every 12 months after installation. CPU timekeeper battery replacement every 5 years or when Service Monitor Error Code 0xHOST1100 is shown.

title: GE Healthcare Aisys - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the GE Healthcare Aisys anesthesia machine, including manufacturer-listed PM intervals, replacement parts, checkout steps, leak testing, and electrical safety testing documentation.
interval: 12-month PM, with additional 24-month and 48-month manufacturer-listed replacement items

title: STERIS AMSCO 4085 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the STERIS AMSCO 4085 surgical table, including visual inspection, hydraulic checks, caster and floor lock checks, battery and charger checks, functional checks, ALS checks, and electrical safety documentation.
interval: Yearly inspection recommended; hydraulic oil level 6x per year; battery charging every 15 days in normal service or more often if usage demands.

title: Nihon Kohden BSM-6000 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for Nihon Kohden BSM-6000 Series bedside monitors, including inspection, diagnostic checks, alarm indicator checks, electrical safety testing, and temperature accuracy checks.
interval: Regular maintenance inspection at least every 6 months. Patient safety checks before first installation, periodically after installation, and after repair.

title: Drager Fabius - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Drager Fabius anesthesia machine, including manufacturer service interval, Test Certificate checks, leak testing, ventilation verification, and electrical safety documentation.
interval: 6 months

title: ICU Medical CADD-Solis - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the ICU Medical CADD-Solis infusion pump, including annual inspection, functional testing, occlusion testing, accuracy testing, and CMMS copy/paste documentation.
interval: Annual inspection and testing; clean and disinfect after each patient use; battery replacement as needed when depleted, damaged, worn, or unusable.

title: Stryker Prime - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Stryker Prime stretcher, including annual PM checks, fifth wheel maintenance, optional electrical safety testing, optional scale checks, and CMMS copy/paste documentation.
interval: At minimum annually. PM may need to be performed more frequently based on usage level. Maintenance after a minimum of every fifth washing includes fifth wheel lubrication.

title: Medtronic Capnostream 20p - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Medtronic Capnostream 20p capnography monitor, including manufacturer-listed intervals, CO2 calibration check, electrical safety testing, and CMMS documentation.
interval: No routine service listed other than institution-mandated performance testing. Qualified service / CO2 pump replacement every 20,000 operating hours. CO2 calibration after initial 1,200 operating hours or 12 months, then every 12 months or 4,000 operating hours. Battery pack replacement recommended every 2 years.

title: Hamilton G5 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Hamilton G5 ventilator, including manufacturer-listed annual or 5,000-hour PM requirements, Test Mode checks, electrical safety testing, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Once a year or once every 5,000 operating hours, whichever comes first; after replacing any component

title: GE Healthcare Giraffe Warmer - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the GE Healthcare Giraffe Warmer infant warmer, including annual electrical safety testing, optional scale calibration, SpO2 leakage testing, resuscitation system checkout reference, and two-year battery and blender maintenance requirements.
interval: Annual; lithium-ion battery replacement and applicable blender maintenance every two years

title: GE Healthcare Panda Warmer - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the GE Healthcare Panda Warmer infant warmer, including annual electrical safety testing, scale calibration when equipped, and applicable two-year maintenance activities.
interval: Annually; lithium-ion battery replacement and applicable blender maintenance every two years

title: Hamilton C1 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Hamilton C1 ventilator, including manufacturer-listed annual or 5000-hour maintenance, filter replacement, battery and blower review, IEC 62353 electrical safety testing, functional testing, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Once a year or once every 5000 operating hours, whichever comes first.

title: Stryker S3 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Stryker S3 Model 3002 Patriot Series MedSurg hospital bed, including annual inspection, electrical safety testing, lubrication, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Annually

title: Baxter PrismaFlex - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Baxter PrismaFlex CRRT control unit, including annual or 6000-hour PM, electrical safety testing, functional checkout, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Every 6000 operating hours or once per year, whichever occurs first.

title: Philips HeartStart MRx - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Philips HeartStart MRx defibrillator/monitor, including visual inspection, Ready For Use indicator review, automated test review, Operational Check, NBP and CO2 checks, electrical safety documentation, and CMMS copy/paste procedure.
interval: Operational checks at regular intervals per Philips service documentation / facility policy; NBP calibration yearly or every 10,000 cycles if equipped; CO2 calibration yearly or every 4,000 operating hours if equipped.

title: Cardinal Health Kangaroo OMNI - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Cardinal Health Kangaroo OMNI enteral feeding pump, including inspection, cleaning checks, alarm check, Biotech Mode Manual Certification, electrical safety documentation, and CMMS work order text.
interval: Every 2 years, or as recommended by facility protocol.

title: Smiths Medical Medfusion 4000 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Smiths Medical Medfusion 4000 syringe infusion pump, including inspection, sensor checks, flow accuracy, occlusion testing, battery review, electrical safety testing, and CMMS documentation.
interval: Annually. Preventive maintenance recommended every 6 months if predominantly battery powered. Additional testing required whenever the pump has been damaged or dropped.

title: Stryker LUCAS 3 - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Stryker LUCAS 3 chest compression system, including inspection, lubrication, function checks, battery review, software/error review, and electrical safety documentation fields.
interval: Not specified in the provided manual.
